hero.tagline: Your personal cardiologist in your pocket.

device.title: Engineering in its purest form.
device.desc: Rythmio was built from scratch – from the PCB design to custom embedded software. Every component chosen to deliver measurement precision on par with clinical devices.

app.title: Full control in a dedicated app.
app.desc: We designed the interface to be as readable as possible. Check battery status, electrode signal quality and monitor the live ECG chart.

mission.title: Our mission.
mission.desc: We believe advanced cardiac diagnostics should be accessible to everyone. We are building Rythmio to remove technological and financial barriers in heart health monitoring.

opinions.title: What people say about us.
opinions.desc1: While working on Rythmio, we consulted our solutions with doctors and medical students. We wanted the device to meet the real needs of the industry – not only from a technical standpoint, but also a clinical one.
opinions.desc2: Read opinions from people associated with the medical industry – doctors, medical personnel, and students – who gave us valuable, professional feedback.
